---
title: "Dracula"
description: "A purple-heavy Dracula theme for Ink components."
---

<ComponentPreview base="ink" name="theme-showcase" theme="dracula" hideCode />

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @termcn/theme-dracula
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { draculaTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/dracula";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={draculaTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">Dracula</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
